content.en:
Ye Tian was waiting outside the Infinite Knife Tower, and this matter quickly spread.

Suddenly, a disciple of the Wuji Sword Sect came here.

They didn't know much about Ye Tian.

After all, although Ye Tian's reputation was very loud, only the high-level of the Terran and some powerhouses of the Supreme Hall of the Terran and His Highnesses knew about it, and the martial artists of other forces of the Terran did not know about Ye Tian's existence.

If it was just the name of His Highness in the Xuan-level region, it would not be able to suppress the disciples of the Infinite Sword Sect.

In terms of overall strength, the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race is not as good as the Infinite Sword Sect, after all, the Infinite Sword Sect is much stronger than the Supreme Hall of the Terran in other aspects except for the small number of supremes.

For example, there are too many martial artists at the level of god-level, true god-level, great god-level, galaxy-level, and galaxy-level, and there are many cosmic gods and masters accumulated by the Wuji Sword Sect over countless years.

It can even be said that except for the sect master of the Wuji Sword Sect and a few elders, everyone else is not clear about the true background and strength of the Wuji Sword Sect.

Ye Tian ignored the arrival of the disciples of the Infinite Sword Sect, and sat cross-legged in an open space, waiting silently.

Suddenly.

There was a commotion.

"Three god-level Daoists are here!"

Whoa!!

Three disciples of the Infinite Sword Sect who had cultivated at the ninth order of the god level, wearing Taoist robes, came with their feet in the void.

As soon as these three people arrived, the other disciples were extremely respectful.

The Inheritance Daozi is an incomparably noble disciple of the Wuji Sword Sect, as long as he passes through the sixth layer of the Wuji Dao Tower, he can become the inheritance Daozi of the Wuji Sword Sect, and the strength and potential of each Inheritance Daozi are very strong.

"Your Highness, the inheritance of the Wuji Sword Sect may be provocative, please be merciful to Your Highness's subordinates, otherwise it will be easy to offend the Wuji Sword Sect, and it will be difficult to enter the Sword Shrine!"

The voice of the Lord of Darkness came.

The Dark Lord is hidden in the dark, and these disciples of the Infinite Sword Sect can't see the Dark Master, and they are not qualified to see the Dark Master.

The master is such a powerful existence, even in the Wuji Sword Sect, it is also the level of the elder of the inner gate, high up, and ordinary inheritance Dao Zi is not qualified to see the master.

"Lord of Darkness, the inheritance of the Infinite Sword Sect, how do I think their breath has the breath of the Children of the Universe?

Ye Tianchuanyin asked.

The Dark Lord explained, "Your Highness, only half of the Terrans' Sons of the Universe are actually concentrated in the Terran Supreme Hall, and the other half are basically located in the Nine Supreme-level Forces. For example, a supreme-level force like the Infinite Sword Sect, their inheritance Dao is the Son of the Universe, and as a Inheritance Dao in the Infinite Sword Sect, their treatment is no worse than that in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race. Therefore, the nine supreme-level forces will only send some weaker inheritance Dao sons into the supreme hall of the human race, and the truly excellent inheritance Dao sons will remain in the headquarters. His Highness should have basically discovered that many of the Highnesses of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race are from other star domains outside the Holy Domain, and there are not many who really belong to the Holy Domain. And the overall strength of the Holy Domain even surpassed the combined strength of other star domains, and the reason why only so many His Highnesses entered the Supreme Hall of the Human Race was because of the nine supreme-level forces. "

"Lord of Darkness, in this case, wouldn't it be good if the other sons of the universe joined the Nine Supreme-level forces, why did they all join the Supreme Hall of the Human Race?" Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

"Because of the rules!" said the Dark Master, "The Supreme Hall of the Terran Race was originally established by the Supremes of the Nine Supreme-level Forces, so it can't compete with the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race for other Children of the Universe. In addition, there are some opportunities and treatments that only the highnesses of the Supreme Hall of the Terran race are eligible to enjoy, and the inheritance Dao sons of the nine supreme forces cannot enjoy them. For example, the title of His Royal Highness can only be used by His Highnesses in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and these inheritance Daoists cannot be used. In addition, like many opportunities outside the human race, the inheritance Dao of the nine supreme forces are not qualified to go. For example, in the last ruin world, the inheritance Dao of the nine supreme forces was not qualified to go. "

"Of course, if the inheritance Dao of the Nine Supreme Powers does not go to the Ruins World and other places of opportunity, there is also a lot less danger. Therefore, the Dao sons of the nine supreme forces were almost not in danger, while the highnesses of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race had fallen a lot because they often had to fight for the glory of the Terran Race. Relatively speaking, the inheritance of the Dao is relatively safe, but the temperament is basically inferior to the highnesses of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, so the strong people born of the inheritance of the Dao are far inferior to the Highnesses cultivated by the Supreme Hall of the Human Race. "

After the Dark Lord said this, Ye Tian almost understood.

To put it simply, these inheritance Daozi are just a group of flowers hiding in a greenhouse, and there is no shortage of natural resources, but what they lack is that willpower and the ability to face life and death.

Of course, this is not to say that there are no real strong and demons among the inheritors of the Dao, but they are very rare, and the probability is too low.

......

"You are Your Highness from the Supreme Hall of the Terrans?"

Thunder Daozi, one of the three god-level inheritance Daozi, walked towards Ye Tian and asked.

"Don't bother me!"

Ye Tian replied lightly, and immediately closed his eyes to recuperate.

Thunder Daozi was furious and felt ignored.

In the Infinite Sword Sect, he was a high-ranking inheritor of the Dao, with unlimited potential in the future, and he was ignored.

Although Ye Tian came from the supreme hall of the human race, he did not think that he was weaker than Ye Tian.

In his opinion, the strength of those highnesses in the supreme hall of the human race is just like that, and many of them are not as good as him.

"There is news from the top of the Wuji Sword Sect that His Highness the Supreme Hall of the Human Race is vainly trying to enter the sword mound of our Wuji Sword Sect, and he has also said that he wants to challenge the Wuji Dao Tower and want to break through the ninth layer. Hehe, do you know what the ninth layer of the Infinite Knife Tower represents, a god-level son of the universe who has never broken through the Infinite Knife Tower may not be too ignorant of our Infinite Knife Sect's Infinite Knife Tower, right?"

Thunder Daozi said coldly.

At this time, the other disciples of the Infinite Sword Sect shouted one after another:

"Thunder Daozi, teach this highness from the supreme hall of the human race, and let him know how powerful our Wuji Dao Sect inheritance Daozi is!"

"Our Infinite Sword Sect's inheritance Daozi is invincible at the same level, and it is the most powerful!"

"Thunder Daozi, let's make a move, and raise the power of the Infinite Sword Sect!"

......

High in the sky.

In front of the Dark Lord stood the Blood Jade Master.

"Blood Jade Master, your Infinite Sword Sect's Inheritance Dao is provoking His Highness Ten Thousand Laws, don't you stop it, otherwise your Inheritance Dao will be in trouble! You should know the strength of His Highness Ten Thousand Laws, even if he has only become a god-level ninth order for a short time, these inheritance Dao Sons are far from being the opponents of His Highness Ten Thousand Laws. "

The Lord of Darkness said.

The Blood Jade Master smiled slightly and said, "Why stop it, it's good to let these inheritance Dao sons suffer, so that they don't have to look at everything." "

Seeing that the Blood Jade Lord didn't care, the Dark Lord didn't care either.

However, since the Blood Jade Master is already present, the lives of these Inheritance Dao Sons are worry-free, and the Dark Master is not afraid that His Highness Wanfa will kill these Inheritance Dao Masters by mistake.

At this time.

At the instigation of many disciples, Thunder Daozi challenged Ye Tian——

"Your Highness from the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, I want to challenge you, will you fight?"

Thunder Daozi held the knife, aimed at Ye Tian, and asked.

"Not interested!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"You have to know that this is the Infinite Sword Sect, it's not something you can refuse if you want to, if you don't want to fight, you don't want to wait quietly for these three days. Thunder Daozi threatened.

Then.

Ye Tian stood up and said, "Let's go up together, so as not to annoy me one by one!"

These words were extremely arrogant, which made the Thunder Daozi and the other two inheritance Daozi and many disciples of the Infinite Sword Sect angry.

"I'm enough to defeat you alone, come to our Infinite Sword Sect's Fighting Martial Altar!"

Thunder Daozi said.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian said lightly behind his hands.

Whew!!

Ye Tian and Thunder Daozi flew to a Douwu platform in the Wuji Sword Sect, after all, they were all god-level powerhouses, and they were not ordinary god-level, the destructive power was too strong, and the Douwu platform was enough to withstand their attacks, it was a suitable place to fight.

The other disciples of the Infinite Sword Sect followed up one by one, and even some galaxy-level and galaxy-level powerhouses of the Infinite Sword Sect also ran over to watch the excitement.

Douwutai.

Ye Tian and Thunder Daozi stood on the stage.

"You make the first move, or you won't have a chance!"

Ye Tian said.

"Don't underestimate me!" Thunder Daozi roared angrily, and immediately displayed a sword technique.

This is not a sword master, it is just a peerless sword technique, but the Thunder Dao Daozi is almost about to walk out of his own path in this sword technique, and the power is even three points more powerful than the ordinary peerless perfect sword technique.

This knife is extraordinary!

"Third-grade pinnacle-level Son of the Universe!"

Ye Tian judged it at a glance.

This kind of strength is indeed good, and it is considered very strong in the Xuan-level area of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, but it is still too weak in his eyes.

Ye Tian didn't even dodge, nor did he attack, but just held up his defense.

Rumble!!!!

The Thunder Daozi almost slashed at the human knife in one, and rushed in front of Ye Tian with incredible momentum, and the powerful high-grade artifact long knife seemed to be coming straight into Ye Tian's chest.

And at this very moment.

A spatial fluctuation froze this space, and Ye Tian's two fingers slammed it over.

In the horrified gaze of Thunder Daozi, his sword skills were forced, and even the high-grade artifact long knife in his hand was caught in the two hands, and he was almost unable to move.

"Open!"

"Open it for me!"

Thunder Daozi tried his best to break free and escape from here.

But the void froze, and the terrifying spatial pressure acted on him, and he couldn't move at all.

"You're too weak!"

Ye Tian stared at the Thunder Daozi and said in the tone of looking at the ants.

Then, Ye Tian lightly slapped his palm on the body of the Thunder Daozi, directly shattering the artifact armor on his body, and the terrifying power of the shock also shook it back.

Boom!!

Lei Daozi's body fell to the other end of the Douwu Stage, colliding with the ground of the Douwu Platform fiercely.

Then, Thunder Daozi spat blood from his mouth, his breath was extremely sluggish, and he almost lost his combat effectiveness.

"Impossible, how can you be so strong!!"

Thunder Daozi was shocked, and his eyes were full of disbelief.
